sections.paragraph: the belly, so called from its being curved, convex; like the Germ. Bauch, from the verb beugen, and Hebr. גָּחֹון from the root גָּחַן, Jerem. 51:34 (Aram. ܟܪܶܣ, ܟܰܪܣܳܐ, כְּרֵיסָא i.q. בֶּטֶן; Arabic كِرْشُ the ventricle of ruminating animals, كَرْشَاءُ a woman with a large belly.)
